Sandbox_IKFRVP_Enabled_tooltip: Master switch. When off, this mod does not change vehicle definitions. When on, each vehicle uses either the curated profile pipeline, the simple generic pipeline, or neither—depending on Curated profiles, Simple tuning for other vehicles, and whether the vehicle is on the mod's list.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_ProfileTuning: Apply tuning to vehicles on the mod profile list
Sandbox_IKFRVP_ProfileTuning_tooltip: When on, vehicles that match the mod's internal list use the profile pipeline: bespoke engine force and mass targets, plus this mod's reverse, coast, and base-brake retune. When off, those same vehicles are not tuned here unless Simple tuning for other vehicles is on, in which case they receive the generic multipliers instead. Workshop cars only match if their script name is mapped in the mod.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_GenericMultiplierTuning: Apply simple multipliers to vehicles not on the profile list
Sandbox_IKFRVP_GenericMultiplierTuning_t: When on, any vehicle that is not taking the curated profile path uses this pipeline instead: multiply script engine force and mass, then apply the generic reverse, brake, and coast sliders. That includes unknown vehicles, and also listed vehicles if Curated profiles is turned off.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_AuditOnly: Calculate changes only; do not apply
Sandbox_IKFRVP_AuditOnly_tooltip: When on, the mod still calculates what it would change and can write that to the console when debug logging is on, but it does not apply changes to vehicles. Useful for checking compatibility on a server before going live.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_CSRCompatibilityMode_tool: When on, the mod avoids stepping on vehicle systems owned by Common Sense Reborn. Leave on if you run CSR. With debug logging on, CSR detection is reported in the console.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_CSRTowAssistCompensation: Adjust engine output when CSR tow assist exceeds defaults
Sandbox_IKFRVP_CSRTowAssistCompensation_: If CSR is present and its tow-assist sandbox values are higher than CSR defaults, the mod can slightly reduce curated engine-force targets so cars do not feel absurdly strong while towing. Evaluated once around startup; only affects curated (profile) engine force, not generic-only vehicles.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_CSRTowAssistCompensationS: How much of that reduction to apply. 0 = ignore CSR tow factors for this adjustment. 1 = apply the full calculated reduction. Intermediate values blend.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_DebugLogging_tooltip: Writes extra startup, tuning, and optional vehicle probe messages to the game console. Can be noisy; turn off on multiplayer servers unless you are diagnosing an issue.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_HandlingPhysics: Experimental: adjust steering, traction, roll, and suspension
Sandbox_IKFRVP_HandlingPhysics_tooltip: Very early feature. When on, the mod may change steering rate, wheel friction, body roll, and suspension on tuned vehicles (trailers are skipped). This pass has caused wheels or the body to clip into the ground on some vehicles or mod packs. The steering, grip, roll, and suspension sliders below only do something while this option is on. Leave off for stable play.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_BrakeBaseRetain_tooltip: During the mod's brake retune, this is how much of the vehicle script's original braking force is kept before the per-class "Brake" multiplier is applied. Applies to vehicles that receive profile or generic tuning (not only when handling is on). Higher = closer to the script's stock brakes; lower = softer baseline brakes.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_SteeringResponseMult_tool: Only when Handling pass is on. Multiplies how quickly the front wheels steer in. Lower feels heavier and less twitchy; 1.0 matches the script's steering increment before this pass.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_SteeringClampMult_tooltip: Only when Handling pass is on. Scales the script's low-speed steering clamp. Lower reduces sharp darting during small steering inputs; 1.0 leaves the script value unchanged before this pass.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_WheelGripMult_tooltip: Only when Handling pass is on. Multiplies wheel friction. Lower adds slip and can make weight transfer more obvious; higher feels more glued down. Large changes can make some mod vehicles behave oddly.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_BodyRollMult_tooltip: Only when Handling pass is on. Multiplies roll influence, capped toward the script maximum. 1.0 leaves roll influence unchanged before this pass; above 1.0 adds more cornering lean up to that cap.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_SuspensionFirmness_toolti: Only when Handling pass is on, and only when not left at 1.0. Above 1.0 stiffens suspension and partially scales damping and compression for a more planted ride. 1.0 skips all suspension edits (safest for mod vehicles that sink or clip). Change in small steps; some packs are very sensitive.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_ProbeIntervalTicks_toolti: When debug logging is on, how many player update ticks to wait between automatic vehicle probe messages. Lower = more frequent logs.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_PowerScale_tooltip: Only for vehicles using a curated profile. Multiplies the profile's target engine force (after sport/heavy power bias and CSR tow compensation). Does not multiply generic-only vehicles; use Generic engine or Global engine torque for those.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_EngineTorqueMult: Final engine output multiplier (all tuned vehicles)
Sandbox_IKFRVP_EngineTorqueMult_tooltip: Last multiplier on engine force for tuned vehicles with an engine: after profiles or generic tuning, class engine mults, CSR compensation, and the handling pass. 1.0 = no change at this step. Lower softens acceleration; higher makes the car pull harder. Workshop vehicles whose script names look like Base plus a digit (many car packs) get engine force clamped again after this so values stay near what the pack author tuned.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_MassScale_tooltip: Only for non-trailer vehicles on a curated profile. Multiplies the profile's target mass. Does not apply to generic-only tuning (use Generic mass there). Workshop packs that use Base.<number>… names get mass clamped toward the script baseline so the car does not sink from a bad mass swap.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_SportPowerBias_tooltip: Extra multiplier on curated engine force for vehicles classified as sport or race. 1.0 adds no extra on top of the profile and Global power scale.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_HeavyVehiclePowerBias_too: Extra multiplier on curated engine force for trucks, vans, SUVs, and similar heavy classes. 1.0 adds no extra on top of the profile and Global power scale.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_TrailerMassScale_tooltip: Multiplies curated trailer mass targets. Trailers do not use the same global mass scale as cars and trucks.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_GenericEngineForceMultipl: When Simple tuning for other vehicles is on, multiplies the vehicle script's engine force. 1.0 leaves stock engine force before other generic sliders and global engine torque.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_GenericMassMultiplier_too: When Simple tuning for other vehicles is on, multiplies the vehicle script's mass. 1.0 leaves stock mass before global engine torque and third-party clamps.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_CompactEngineMult_tooltip: Extra multiplier on final engine force for compact-class curated vehicles only. Stacks after Global power scale. 1.0 means no extra class-specific change.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_CompactMassMult_tooltip: Extra multiplier on final mass for compact-class curated vehicles. 1.0 means no extra class-specific change.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_CompactRollMult_tooltip: Multiplies stopping movement force after the mod's base coast retune. Lower lets the car roll farther off throttle; higher slows it faster when you lift. 1.0 means no extra class-specific change.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_CompactBrakeMult_tooltip: Multiplies braking force after the base brake retune and Base brake strength. Lower = weaker foot brake for compacts. 1.0 means no extra class-specific change.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_CompactReverseMult_toolti: Multiplies reverse speed cap after the mod's base reverse retune. Lower = slower reverse; higher = faster, still bounded by the mod's safety caps. 1.0 means no extra class-specific change.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_StandardEngineMult_toolti: Extra multiplier on final engine force for standard sedans, wagons, and typical modern cars on a curated profile. 1.0 = no extra class change.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_StandardMassMult_tooltip: Extra multiplier on final mass for standard-class curated vehicles. 1.0 = no extra class change.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_StandardRollMult_tooltip: Multiplies stopping movement force for standard-class curated vehicles after base retune. 1.0 = no extra class change.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_StandardBrakeMult_tooltip: Multiplies braking force for standard-class curated vehicles after base retune. 1.0 = no extra class change.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_StandardReverseMult_toolt: Multiplies reverse speed cap for standard-class curated vehicles after base retune. 1.0 = no extra class change.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_SportEngineMult_tooltip: Extra multiplier on final engine force for sport and race curated vehicles. 1.0 = no extra class change.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_SportMassMult_tooltip: Extra multiplier on final mass for sport-class curated vehicles. 1.0 = no extra class change.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_SportRollMult_tooltip: Multiplies stopping movement force for sport-class curated vehicles after base retune. 1.0 = no extra class change.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_SportBrakeMult_tooltip: Multiplies braking force for sport-class curated vehicles after base retune. 1.0 = no extra class change.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_SportReverseMult_tooltip: Multiplies reverse speed cap for sport-class curated vehicles after base retune. 1.0 = no extra class change.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_HeavyEngineMult_tooltip: Extra multiplier on final engine force for heavy-class curated vehicles (trucks, vans, large SUVs, step vans). 1.0 = no extra class change.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_HeavyMassMult_tooltip: Extra multiplier on final mass for heavy-class curated vehicles. 1.0 = no extra class change.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_HeavyRollMult_tooltip: Multiplies stopping movement force for heavy-class curated vehicles after base retune. Lower can feel heavier when coasting. 1.0 = no extra class change.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_HeavyBrakeMult_tooltip: Multiplies braking force for heavy-class curated vehicles after base retune. 1.0 = no extra class change.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_HeavyReverseMult_tooltip: Multiplies reverse speed cap for heavy-class curated vehicles after base retune. 1.0 = no extra class change.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_TrailerMassMult_tooltip: Extra multiplier on trailer mass after Trailer mass scale. 1.0 = no extra class change.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_GenericRollMult_tooltip: When Simple tuning for other vehicles is on, multiplies stopping movement force for those vehicles after the base retune. 1.0 = no extra change.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_GenericBrakeMult_tooltip: When Simple tuning for other vehicles is on, multiplies braking force after the base retune. 1.0 = no extra change.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_GenericReverseMult_toolti: When Simple tuning for other vehicles is on, multiplies reverse speed cap after the base retune. 1.0 = no extra change.
